title: Force-replace navbar logo text from 'GrowthBridge Media' to 'HP BRIDGE MEDIA'

requirements.summary: Replace all occurrences of 'GrowthBridge Media' in Navbar.tsx with 'HP BRIDGE MEDIA'
acceptanceCriteria: The navbar logo area displays 'HP BRIDGE MEDIA' and not 'GrowthBridge Media' when the page first loads.
The navbar logo area displays 'HP BRIDGE MEDIA' after the user scrolls down (scroll-triggered background change state).
No string 'GrowthBridge Media', 'GrowthBridge', or 'Growth Bridge Media' remains in Navbar.tsx.

file_operations.description: Locate every hardcoded string or JSX text node that renders 'GrowthBridge Media' (including partial matches such as 'GrowthBridge' or 'Growth Bridge Media') and replace each one with 'HP BRIDGE MEDIA'. Ensure the navbar logo text visible in the top-left reads 'HP BRIDGE MEDIA' at all viewport sizes and in both the transparent and scrolled/opaque background states. This applies to all occurrences in the desktop navbar and mobile drawer menu.

requirements.summary: Replace all occurrences of 'GrowthBridge Media' across all frontend source files with 'HP BRIDGE MEDIA'
acceptanceCriteria: The browser tab title reads 'HP BRIDGE MEDIA'.
The footer logo/copyright reads 'HP BRIDGE MEDIA'.
The AccessDeniedScreen renders 'HP BRIDGE MEDIA' wherever the company name appears.
No user-facing text anywhere on the site displays 'GrowthBridge Media' or any variation.

file_operations.description: Replace the <title> tag content from 'GrowthBridge Media' to 'HP BRIDGE MEDIA' so the browser tab displays the correct company name.
Replace all occurrences of 'GrowthBridge Media' with 'HP BRIDGE MEDIA' in the footer logo text, copyright line, and any other text nodes that reference the company name.
Replace all occurrences of 'GrowthBridge Media' with 'HP BRIDGE MEDIA' in the access denied screen message and any other text that references the company name.
Replace all occurrences of 'GrowthBridge Media', 'GrowthBridge', or 'Growth Bridge Media' with 'HP BRIDGE MEDIA' in the hero section headline, subtext, or any other text nodes.
Replace all occurrences of 'GrowthBridge Media', 'GrowthBridge', or 'Growth Bridge Media' with 'HP BRIDGE MEDIA' in any text nodes, comments, or string literals within the root App component.
Replace all occurrences of 'GrowthBridge Media', 'GrowthBridge', or 'Growth Bridge Media' with 'HP BRIDGE MEDIA' in the admin dashboard page headers, labels, or any other text nodes.
Replace all occurrences of 'GrowthBridge Media', 'GrowthBridge', or 'Growth Bridge Media' with 'HP BRIDGE MEDIA' in form labels, placeholders, help text, or any other text nodes.
Replace all occurrences of 'GrowthBridge Media', 'GrowthBridge', or 'Growth Bridge Media' with 'HP BRIDGE MEDIA' in form labels, placeholders, help text, or any other text nodes.
Replace all occurrences of 'GrowthBridge Media', 'GrowthBridge', or 'Growth Bridge Media' with 'HP BRIDGE MEDIA' in step descriptions, titles, or any other text nodes.
Replace all occurrences of 'GrowthBridge Media', 'GrowthBridge', or 'Growth Bridge Media' with 'HP BRIDGE MEDIA' in pricing tier descriptions, CTAs, or any other text nodes.
Replace all occurrences of 'GrowthBridge Media', 'GrowthBridge', or 'Growth Bridge Media' with 'HP BRIDGE MEDIA' in service card titles, descriptions, or any other text nodes.
Replace all occurrences of 'GrowthBridge Media', 'GrowthBridge', or 'Growth Bridge Media' with 'HP BRIDGE MEDIA' in stat labels, descriptions, or any other text nodes.
Replace all occurrences of 'GrowthBridge Media', 'GrowthBridge', or 'Growth Bridge Media' with 'HP BRIDGE MEDIA' in modal title, instructions, or any other text nodes.
Replace all occurrences of 'GrowthBridge Media', 'GrowthBridge', or 'Growth Bridge Media' with 'HP BRIDGE MEDIA' in success message text or any other text nodes.
